---
title: "Behavioral Economics"
description: "Prospect theory, nudges, heuristics, time preferences, social norms."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
60 TUTORIALS
:::

# Behavioral Economics

Prospect theory, nudges, heuristics, time preferences, social norms.
